to: satisfy itself as to the matters falling within subsections (2) to (4) before making an activity direction or imposing an activity condition
obtain and consider information about the individual who would be subject to the direction or the condition before making such a direction or order

for: the officer of the Service or Welsh family proceedings officer
to: comply with any request from the court to provide information as to the matters in subsections (2) to (5)
consider information about any conflict with the individual's religious beliefs or any interference with the times at which he normally works or attends an educational establishment

conditions.text: the likely effect of the direction or the condition is being assessed
